title: Core entity + view model TypeScript types

task.description: Add strict, runtime-free TypeScript types for core entities and UI view models used by Today/Habits/Calendar/Stats. Types must match SPEC field names/types and compile under TypeScript strict mode.
acceptance_criteria: `src/lib/types/viewModels.ts` exports `HabitWithCategory`, `TodayHabitRow`, `CalendarDaySummary`, `StatsPeriod`, `StatsSummary` with no runtime code (type-only exports)
`tsc --noEmit` succeeds with TypeScript strict mode enabled

definition_of_done: Types are exported and imported without runtime side effects
No `const`, functions, or DB code added in these files
